<Option id="id169" name="COLOR" scope="legacy">

<Option id="id170" name="NIB TYPE" scope="legacy">
<Description>Type of Nib</Description>
<ApplicationRef application="Teamcenter" label="QFLAAMGnZXnTzC" version="QFNAAMGnZXnTzC"></ApplicationRef>
<Value v="THICK"></Value>
<Value v="THIN"></Value></Option></PLMXML>
PLM XML | Siemens Software
Representing a variety of product data, PLM XML provides a lightweight, flexible mechanism for transporting high-content product data.
